slides.title: The goal isn't a longer life. It's a *stronger* one.
slides.sub: Healthspan is the years you stay capable, sharp and active. Here is how to extend it.

slides.title: Healthspan, not just lifespan
slides.body: Lifespan is how long you live. Healthspan is how long you live *well*. For many people the gap is a decade.

slides.title: Build and keep muscle
slides.body: Strength is one of the clearest markers of aging well. Two sessions a week *can protect* your independence for decades.

slides.title: Train your heart
slides.body: Cardio fitness is a powerful predictor of a long life. A brisk daily walk *does more than you think*.

slides.title: Guard your sleep
slides.body: Deep sleep repairs the body and clears the brain. Years of short sleep *quietly speed up* aging.

slides.title: Stay connected
slides.body: Strong relationships rival diet and exercise for longevity. Loneliness *is linked to* worse health and shorter lives.

slides.title: Build years that *feel good*.
slides.body: Vibe Health scores the sleep, food, movement and steps that protect your healthspan, all in one daily number.
slides.cta_text: search ‘Vibe Health’ on the App Store

caption:
Living longer is the easy part. Staying strong, sharp and capable is the real goal. 🌿

Muscle, cardio fitness, deep sleep and real connection are the levers that add good years, not just years. Save this. 🔖

Vibe Health turns those habits into one daily score → link in bio.
youtube_title: How to Add Healthy Years to Your Life
